_about: Synthetic stand-in for 'queries sampled from real session history' (layer 1b). Same schema as qa_fixture. At deploy time a real sampler replaces this via load_history_samples(source=...). These are deliberately real-traffic-flavoured (terse, mixed).

items.knowledge: the fork remote is origin sam7894604 hermes-agent

items.query: how do we ship recall index rebuilds
items.knowledge: run hermes mem4 rebuild to reconstruct the recall index from source files
mem4 的召回資料庫是 recall.db,放在 mem4 目錄下

items.query: 那個審計表在哪個資料庫
items.knowledge: 記憶審計表 907 在 Baserow 資料庫 299
the trigram tokenizer handles CJK substring search in mem4 recall

items.query: Dream 整併會不會動 MEMORY.md
items.knowledge: Dream 只整併 mem4 自有的 L2/L3,永不寫 hot zone MEMORY.md

items.query: keep the model from calling out over the network on warmup
items.knowledge: prefetch is local I/O only, never MCP or network, with a char cap
backfill 進度以 backfill_cursor 記在 mem4_state.json,可續跑
